steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll create a single HTML file for the design system slide with color swatches and typography, then verify it by rendering to PNG.

First, I'll write the HTML file with inline CSS to meet all the requirements.

tool_calls.name: write_file
tool_calls.content_head:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Design System Swatches & Typography</title>

steps.assistant_content_head: Now I'll render the HTML to a PNG and verify it meets the specifications.

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: python3 -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p=sync_playwright().start(); b=p.chromium.launch(); pg=b.new_page(viewport={'width':1920,'height':1080}); pg.goto('file://' + __import__('o

steps.assistant_content_head: I'll examine the rendered PNG to verify if the slide meets all specifications.

I can see that the slide has some issues that need to be fixed:

1. The color swatches are not arranged in a 5-column × 3-row grid as specified
2. The hex codes are not properly displayed at the bottom of each swatch
3. The typography section is not aligned correctly (it's overlapping with the color swatches)
4. The typography samples are not properly sized and styled
